title: Sous-Vide Sweet Corn Porridge
description: A light and fluffy Vietnamese-style sweet corn porridge made with white cornmeal, cooked sous-vide for a perfect texture and flavor.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring water and cornmeal to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer until thickened, about 5 minutes.
Pour the mixture into a blender or food processor and blend until smooth. If using coconut milk or almond milk, add it now and blend again until creamy.
Sous-vide the blended corn porridge for 1 hour at 82°C (179°F).
Allow the sous-vide cooked porridge to cool slightly before serving.
